svg.style: background: transparent; background-color: transparent; color-scheme: light dark;
svg.content:
<mxfile host="Electron"> <diagram name="总览" id="overview"> <mxGraphModel dx="-614" dy="-176" grid="0" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="0" page="0" pageScale="1" pageWidth="1169" pageHeight="680" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <mxCell id="title" parent="1" style="text;html=1;align=center;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=15;fontStyle=1;" value="三条命令 = CI + CD + DevOps 三阶段" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="28" width="490" x="340" y="30" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="cmd1" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dbeafe;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=14;fontStyle=1;" value="/pr-all" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="46" width="130" x="70" y="110" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="cmd2" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dbeafe;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=14;fontStyle=1;" value="/deploy
+ /prod-testing" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="46" width="150" x="520" y="110" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="cmd3" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dbeafe;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=14;fontStyle=1;" value="/prod-debug" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="46" width="130" x="980" y="110" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="ci" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=13;fontStyle=1;dashed=0;" value="CI 阶段" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="40" width="200" x="40" y="210" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="cd" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=13;fontStyle=1;" value="CD 阶段" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="40" width="200" x="490" y="210" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="devops" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=13;fontStyle=1;" value="DevOps 阶段" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="40" width="200" x="940" y="210" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="ci1" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#94a3b8;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=12;" value="同步 dev 解冲突" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="34" width="180" x="50" y="280" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="ci2" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#94a3b8;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=12;" value="建 MR 到 dev" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="34" width="180" x="50" y="324" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="ci3" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#94a3b8;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=12;" value="@code-reviewer 审查" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="34" width="180" x="50" y="368" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="ci4" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#fef3c7;strokeColor=#d97706;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=12;fontStyle=1;" value="AI 自动修复问题" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="34" width="180" x="50" y="412" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="ci5" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#94a3b8;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=12;" value="收敛后自动合并" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="34" width="180" x="50" y="456" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="cd1" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#94a3b8;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=12;" value="构建 jar + dist" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="34" width="180" x="500" y="280" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="cd2" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#94a3b8;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=12;" value="scp 上传服务器" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="34" width="180" x="500" y="324" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="cd3" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#94a3b8;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=12;" value="重启 + 健康检查" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="34" width="180" x="500" y="368" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="cd4" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#94a3b8;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=12;" value="API 冒烟验证" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="34" width="180" x="500" y="412" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="cd5" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#94a3b8;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=12;" value="H5 + 运营后台冒烟" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="34" width="180" x="500" y="456" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="do1" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#94a3b8;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=12;" value="切 prod profile" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="34" width="180" x="950" y="280" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="do2" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#94a3b8;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=12;" value="连生产库排查" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="34" width="180" x="950" y="324" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="do3" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#94a3b8;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=12;" value="三铁律锁只读" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="34" width="180" x="950" y="368" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="do4" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#fef3c7;strokeColor=#d97706;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=12;fontStyle=1;" value="高危操作停下问人" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="34" width="180" x="950" y="412" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e1" edge="1" parent="1" source="cmd1" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;strokeColor=#2563eb;exitX=0.5;exitY=1;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0.5;entryY=0;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;" target="ci"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e2" edge="1" parent="1" source="cmd2" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;strokeColor=#2563eb;exitX=0.5;exitY=1;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0.5;entryY=0;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;" target="cd"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e3" edge="1" parent="1" source="cmd3" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;strokeColor=#2563eb;exitX=0.5;exitY=1;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0.5;entryY=0;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;" target="devops"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="note" parent="1" style="text;html=1;align=left;fontColor=#475569;fontSize=11;fontStyle=2;" value="黄色框 = 云效 CI/CD 做不到、命令行独有的能力" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="24" width="420" x="40" y="540" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="arrow1" edge="1" parent="1" source="ci" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;strokeColor=#94a3b8;exitX=1;exitY=0.5;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0;entryY=0.5;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;dashed=1;" target="cd"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="arrow2" edge="1" parent="1" source="cd" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;strokeColor=#94a3b8;exitX=1;exitY=0.5;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0;entryY=0.5;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;dashed=1;" target="devops"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>
